title: Fix first-time progress camera permission error
description: Progress camera can show a long raw camera exception the first time Android asks for camera permission. Handle first-time permission/init races gracefully and avoid exposing raw exception text in UI.
close_reason: Fixed first-time progress camera permission/init race and removed raw camera exception text from user-facing messages.

title: Force Google Sign-In account selection
close_reason: Closed

title: Collect production deployment inputs
description: Actual production deployment needs target VPS/hosting, API domain, MongoDB URI, JWT_SECRET, OTP_PEPPER, social provider production credentials, SePay/Cloudinary values if enabled, and Android release keystore/client SHA details.

title: Prepare production deployment
description: Prepare and verify deploy path for V-FIT backend and Flutter Android app, including production env requirements, Android signing/OAuth requirements, and local build smoke checks.
close_reason: Deployment preflight completed locally: backend tests, frontend auth analyze, debug APK build/signing verification, and production compose config validation passed. Actual deployment awaits production inputs/secrets.

title: Document deploy-ready architecture rules
description: Create project architecture rules for deploy-ready frontend/backend changes, covering environment boundaries, OAuth clients, Android signing, backend provider verification, quality gates, and release checklist.
close_reason: Added deploy-ready architecture rules and linked them from agent and production docs.

title: Use stable Android debug keystore for Google OAuth
description: Configure Flutter Android debug/profile builds to sign with the user debug keystore that matches the existing Google Cloud Android OAuth SHA-1, and update diagnostics/docs accordingly.
close_reason: Debug/profile Android builds now use the user debug keystore that matches the existing Google Cloud OAuth SHA-1; diagnostics/docs updated.

title: Log Google Sign-In pre-backend failures
description: Add debug console logging for Google Sign-In PlatformException failures before backend social-login is called, so local debugging shows why BE has no response.
close_reason: Added debug logs that distinguish Google provider SDK failures from backend social-login requests.

title: Make Google OAuth config deploy-ready
description: Refactor frontend Google OAuth diagnostic constants to support deploy-time overrides for Android client id, package, signing variant, SHA-1, and SHA-256, and document debug/release setup.
close_reason: Google OAuth diagnostics now support deploy-time Android client/package/signing/SHA overrides and docs cover debug/release setup.

title: Correct Google debug signing fingerprint
description: Update Google Sign-In diagnostics and docs to use the SHA-1/SHA-256 fingerprint from the actual built debug APK instead of the user debug keystore fingerprint.
close_reason: Updated Google debug SHA-1/SHA-256 to match the actual signed app-debug.apk certificate.

title: Switch Google Sign-In to Web OAuth client
description: Replace the previously incorrect installed/desktop OAuth client ID with the newly created Web application OAuth client ID for Flutter serverClientId and backend token audience verification.
close_reason: Replaced the incorrect installed/desktop OAuth client ID with the Web application OAuth client ID in Flutter, docs, and local backend env.

title: Configure local Google OAuth client ID
description: Wire the Google Web OAuth client ID into local frontend/backend configuration so Google Sign-In can run locally with Android OAuth package/SHA already configured in Google Console.
close_reason: Configured Google Web OAuth client ID for local backend env, Flutter default client ID, and social-login quickstart/docs.

title: Configure Android OAuth client for Google Sign-In
description: Google Sign-In on Android requires an Android OAuth client registered with package com.vfit.vfit_frontend and the SHA-1/SHA-256 of the debug or release keystore used to run the app. If ApiException: 10 remains after the repo-side client fix, update Google Cloud/Firebase OAuth configuration and rebuild.

title: Fix Google sign-in configuration error
description: Google Sign-In currently fails with PlatformException(sign_in_failed, com.google.android.gms.common.api.ApiException: 10). Investigate Android/Firebase OAuth configuration and app code, then apply the repo-appropriate fix.
close_reason: Repo-side GoogleSignIn client configuration fixed: Android no longer passes web clientId as clientId, keeps web client ID as serverClientId, and surfaces ApiException 10 as actionable configuration guidance.

title: Implement Google and Facebook login
description: Implement social login for Android and web: backend provider verification, canonical user linking, V-FIT JWT issuance, and Flutter login buttons below the existing login form.
close_reason: Implemented Google/Facebook social login for Android and web with backend token verification, canonical account linking, V-FIT JWT issuance, Flutter login buttons, Android Facebook SDK config, and verification tests.

title: Harden AI-driven VFIT production paths
description: Refactor AI-driven backend flows, security gates, DTO mapping, async event configuration, and frontend path references against Spec Kit rules.
close_reason: Completed AI-driven backend hardening, DTO mapping, security gates, and verification

title: Refresh VFIT AI-driven Spec Kit files

close_reason: Refreshed VFIT AI-driven Spec Kit files from backend/frontend code analysis, including stack, sync/async flows, prompt governance, AI boundary, and current queue/context reality.

description: Scan current VFIT codebase and populate Spec Kit constitution, baseline specification, implementation plan, ADR, and system prompt for the AI-native architecture.
close_reason: Populated AI-native Spec Kit baseline, constitution, plan, ADR, and system prompt.

close_reason: Created docs/VFIT_SYSTEM_SRS.md with system SRS, business flows, use cases, diagrams, API summary, data model, requirements, and risks from FE/BE scan.

close_reason: Redesigned login UI to compact premium light/dark layout and updated Google button copy to emphasize account selection

close_reason: Recorded Android Google OAuth client id and clarified Web-vs-Android client usage in code and docs.
